title: 40 pcs Suction Hooks, Clear Suction Cup Hooks with Plastic Hook, 4 cm Sucker Hook for Glass, Window, Tile, Bathroom, Shower, Kitchen, Christmas Wreaths, Lights
features: 40 pcs Suction Hooks: The package contains 40 pcs suction cup hooks, each one is 4 cm/1.57 in, sufficient quantity to meet your various daily needs

PVC Sucker Hooks: Suction cup hooks are made of waterproof PVC material, these sucker hooks have strong suction and adhere firmly to glass. The transparent design is discreet and won't affect your home decor
Easy to Use: Simply keep the surface clean and dry, and you can quickly install the suction cup without drilling. The suction hook can be reused and it is easy to remove without leaving any residue

Hanging Decorations & Objects: Suction hooks can be used to hang Christmas lights, wreaths, ornaments, keys, towels, dishes, shower accessories, bath towels, and more, helping you organize and store your belongings easily

Multifunctional: Suction hooks are suitable for installation in window, bathroom, kitchen, and can firmly adhere to smooth surfaces like: tiles, glass, metal. They are also a good choice for travel, as many hotel bathrooms do not have enough wall hooks
